name: How much does it cost to sue over AI referral malpractice in NY?
description: Usually contingency, no upfront cost in NY.

mainEntity.name: How much does it cost to sue over AI referral malpractice in NY?

acceptedAnswer.text: Usually contingency, no upfront cost in NY.
acceptedAnswer.description: Contingency typical (30-40% of win); no upfront for qualified cases. NY allows fee recovery. Key factors: (1) Case strength; (2) Expert costs ~$10k; (3) Court fees low. Shop multiple firms.
